query_text: playful freestyle ski for the park

results.explanation: Armada ARV 106 strongly matches on: playfulness. Review: "most playful ski I've ever been on — butters, spins, everything feels easy." Review: "Playful factor is off the charts"
Blizzard Rustler 10 strongly matches on: playfulness. Review: "Incredibly playful — you can butter, spin, and smear with ease" Review: "Pop off everything, spin easily, land softly"
Faction Dictator 3.0 strongly matches on: playfulness. Review: "great for butters, natural features, and creative skiing" Review: "the playfulness is addictive"
Black Crows Atris strongly matches on: playfulness. Review: "More playful than heavy titanal powder skis" Review: "playful enough to navigate tight trees"
Moment Wildcat 108 strongly matches on: playfulness. Review: "playful enough to throw tricks" Review: "more playful than the Mindbender"
DPS Pagoda Tour 112 RP strongly matches on: playfulness. Review: "Downhill in powder is pure bliss" Review: "Handles beautifully in open bowls"
Rossignol Experience 78 Ca strongly matches on: playfulness. Review: "Light enough that my legs don't get tired." Review: "Light weight reduces fatigue in lessons"
Elan Ripstick 96 strongly matches on: playfulness. Review: "Decent playfulness and edge grip" Review: "Light and fun to ski"
Head Easy Joy SLR strongly matches on: playfulness. Review: "super soft flex" Review: "So easy to turn, so light, so forgiving"
K2 Disruption 78C strongly matches on: playfulness. Review: "Lightweight, not tiring" Review: "Soft enough to be friendly"
